content.json:
# PRODAFT USTA — Account Takeover Prevention

Monitors compromised corporate credentials ingested from the PRODAFT USTA Account Takeover Prevention API. Passwords are never stored — only strength signals (score and length) are retained at ingestion.

Time filtering uses **Created** (the event time reported by USTA) so historical backfilled tickets appear on the correct date.

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| summarize Credentials = count() by bin(Created, 1d)
| sort by Created asc
content.title: Compromised credentials over time

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| extend Scope = iff(IsCorporate == true, "Corporate", "Personal")
| summarize Count = count() by Scope
content.title: Corporate vs personal

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| summarize Credentials = count() by CompanyName
| top 10 by Credentials desc
content.title: Top affected companies

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(VictimMalware)
| summarize Credentials = count() by VictimMalware
| top 10 by Credentials desc
content.title: Top infostealer families

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Source)
| summarize Credentials = count() by Source
content.title: Credentials by leak source

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(PasswordScore)
| summarize Credentials = count() by PasswordScore
| sort by Credentials desc
content.title: Password strength of exposed credentials

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where IsCorporate == true
| project Created, CompanyName, Username, Source, PasswordScore, VictimComputerName, VictimCountry, VictimMalware, InfectionDate, Status
| sort by Created desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent corporate credential tickets
